title: Kanban Plan — ct-cognize CLI UX alignment
description: Align ct-cognize UX with positional invocation expectation and add alias command while preserving compatibility.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Support positional input/taste arguments and alias name ct-cognetive for isolated testing CLI

DONE.task: Extend ct-cognize parser to accept positional input and taste file paths
DONE.status_note: Completed: positional arguments are now accepted with conflict checks and file existence validation.

DONE.task: Add alias wrapper ct-cognetive pointing to ct-cognize implementation
DONE.notes: Keep ct-cognize as canonical for backward compatibility
DONE.status_note: Completed: added executable root wrapper ct-cognetive delegating to tools/ct-cognize/main.py.

DONE.task: Update manifest/help docs to document positional usage and alias
DONE.status_note: Completed: updated MANIFEST usage/examples and CLI help examples.

DONE.task: Add/adjust tests for positional invocation and alias help path
DONE.status_note: Completed: added alias + positional tests; `pytest tests/test_ct_cognize.py` passed (38/38).

acceptance_criteria: Alias command ct-cognetive is executable and shows help
ct-cognize output remains validated against analysis-result schema
